thought_beat_text: The seam is honesty now—he's made that bargain with himself—but honesty means the whole thing is cardboard and light, which means he's been walking through a lie the whole time, and saying it out loud would break something he can't name.
residue_summary: He has reframed the seams as truth, but truth has become the thing he cannot speak without destroying the world he's in.
image_hint: a hand tracing the edge of foam-core in stage light, unable to stop, unable to look away
audio_hint: shallow breath with a low subsonic hum—the sound of something held together by will alone
